mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (writer_id, category, title, content) VALUES (#{writerId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, m.name AS writer_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.post_id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.post_id) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_like pl2 WHERE pl2.post_id = p.post_id AND pl2.member_id = #{memberId}) > 0 AS liked_by_me, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookmark bk WHERE bk.post_id = p.post_id AND bk.member_id = #{memberId}) > 0 AS bookmarked_by_me FROM post p JOIN member m ON p.writer_id = m.member_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO post_like (post_id, member_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{memberId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO bookmark (post_id, member_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{memberId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookmark WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM bookmark WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (post_id, writer_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{writerId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.name AS writer_name FROM comment c JOIN member m ON c.writer_id = m.member_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT c.*, m.name AS writer_name FROM comment c JOIN member m ON c.writer_id = m.member_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_report (post_id, reporter_id, reason) VALUES (#{postId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason})
